summary: EHR web tier returned HTTP 502 on /api/login, indicating the upstream application service was unavailable/refusing connections. Likely EHR service outage impacting clinic operations.
recommended_next_steps: Verify APP tier status on LNX-APP-01 (ehrapp running, recent restarts/crashes) and restore service if down.
Review WEB tier context (nginx_ehr / nginx_ehr_error) to confirm upstream connection refused vs other failure mode.
Check APP01 application logs and DB connectivity for backend errors that could cause upstream failure.
Scope impact: confirm whether multiple clinic workstations are affected and whether the outage is ongoing.
Review recent administrative actions/changes on WEB01/APP01 near the event timestamp (sudo/systemctl/config changes).
analyst_notes: Availability-impacting event; treat as urgent and confirm restoration of service.
